summary: Fixed POV compliance: rewrote Jaina-stillness beat so Sylvanas reads body (stopped breath, frozen posture) rather than certifying the internal 'pattern clicked' event. Fixed Jaina dialogue register: broke 'ordinary commerce of a working kingdom' briefing-speak into spoken-pace units with concrete ending ('bread people eat every morning'). Grounded partnership turn: added Jaina's finger tracing the exact rooftop route from the opposite direction as the concrete moment that makes Sylvanas's recalibration land. Merged 9 texture-desert pockets across all three scenes: participial bridges (chair scraping, Havel drawing nods, funnelling proposals), em-dash joins (Corin overnight-shift info, Havel worker description), compound merges (Havel breath/objection), and an action beat splitting Jaina's first street dialogue.
